summary: Specifies the MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH version format with optional dot-separated pre-release identifiers and build metadata. Section 10 requires build metadata to be ignored when determining precedence, and section 11 defines the precedence algorithm: numeric comparison of the core triple, a pre-release version ranking below its associated normal version, and left-to-right comparison of pre-release identifiers where numeric identifiers compare numerically, alphanumeric identifiers compare in ASCII order, numeric ranks below alphanumeric, and a larger identifier set wins when all preceding identifiers are equal.
title: Semantic Versioning 2.0.0
